title: CylMC: Overhauled
description: A modpack for a close group of friends. Featuring tech, leveling system and more.
body:
![Modpack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53988d53f78848c6c652909a4ca3c347193df919.png)


![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c99501f9792e23dfadad71c9ea1d623b39c43fa5.png)

This modpack offers our take on Progressive gameplay, featuring a mixture of RPG leveling system and technology. But there's more than just that! There is something for almost everyone, with improvements and various tweaks to almost every aspect of the Minecraft experience.
- Are you in for an adventure? There are new dungeons, bosses, combat technique, new worldgen with leveling; monsters might be stronger after leaving spawn further.
- Are you more of an engineer? There's Create, a well-known and well-modded tool for automation and building; with this, the sky is the limit.
- Oh, you like magic? Too bad, we don't have that this time.
- Wanna be a Chef? Sure, but keep your expectations low; your hardest quest for now is to get going, and this time it might be way harder than before.

It doesn't matter what you choose; the main objective is to have fun!
Aside from that, we have loads of other quality-of-life features, tweaks, and other silly things to improve the player's experience.


![Private Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13ee78a0f6ec7a10560aacaa666272487e1f563.png)

This modpack was created with the intention of fostering closer bonds and more enjoyable experiences among members of our Discord community. This modpack serves as a catalyst for bringing our community closer while having fun, each in their own way.

_Modpack is for non-commercial use only_

![warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/340471861b0fea3fa1a4c84f70829c6745542fe6.png)

This modpack is currently in early beta. Some mods might not be configured to their final form aswell some might get removed/replaced sooner or later
